sources.title: Mujeres Salvajes ( 1984)
sources.description: ADULTS ONLY!   WARNING: THEMES OF SEXUAL VIOLENCE Plot: Six women murderers escape from prison to dug out a gold treasure buried in the woods, but six male campers are sitting on it. Birds get shot, women and men get shot, and the prize goes to the surviving few.
